footer.description: The most delicious fast food delivered to your home. Fresh ingredients, unforgettable taste, and lightning-fast delivery across the city. Experience the premium pizza taste today!

home.heroDesc: Your ordered food will be delivered very quickly and carefully

classicBurger.name: Cheese Burger
classicBurger.desc: Juicy beef patty, cheese, fresh vegetables, and our signature sauce.

doubleCheese.name: Classic Pizza
doubleCheese.desc: Mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, beef, mushrooms, black olives, bell peppers, and tomato sauce.

margherita.name: Chicken Lavash
margherita.desc: Soft lavash filled with chicken, fresh vegetables, cheese, and our signature sauce.

pepperoni.name: Pepperoni Pizza
pepperoni.desc: Spicy pepperoni with stretchy mozzarella cheese.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: The best and most delicious dishes just for you
menu.defaultDesc: A special dish prepared fresh and hot based on a great recipe.
menu.emptyTitle: There are no dishes in this category yet.
menu.emptyDesc: Please check back in a moment or switch to another section.

about.title: About Quad Pizza
about.description: Since our Quad opened, it has been growing perfectly without any unnecessary conflicts or complaints, we have all the comfortable conditions.

halal.title: 100% Halal & Clean
halal.desc: Every product and meat item in our kitchen is fully halal certified, and hygiene rules are strictly followed.

hot.title: Hot Delivery
hot.desc: With the help of our special thermal bags, dishes reach you just as hot as they were when taken out of the oven.

payment.title: Easy Payment System
payment.desc: You can make your payment in the most convenient way for you via Click, Payme, cash, or terminal.

promo.title: Regular Promotions
promo.desc: We organize special promo codes, cashbacks, and free delivery days every week for our loyal customers.
